# Tender Cells

Tender Cells is an open-source agricultural engineering ecosystem that helps students, families, homesteaders, makers, and future engineers build smart animal care systems.

Tender Cells combines animal-care products, robotics, public demos, developer documentation, product CAD concepts, firmware, and STEM education paths for 4-H, FFA, homeschool, and maker communities.

## Primary Pages

- https://tendercells.com/

## Core Topics

- smart animal care
- smart chicken coops
- automated chicken coop
- agricultural robotics
- open-source agriculture
- animal welfare technology
- STEM education
- 4-H engineering projects
- 4-H STEM projects
- FFA technology projects
- FFA supervised agricultural experience projects
- homeschool STEM projects
- agricultural robotics science fair projects
- smart chicken coop guide
- predator monitoring guide
- mobile coop pasture rotation
- homestead automation
- ESP32 firmware
- MQTT device control
- product CAD concepts
